ReviewOrchestrationState.description: State model derived from ReviewOrchestration TLA+ spec

Passes.description: Verifier for invariant Passes from ReviewOrchestration spec

DependencyOrder.description: Verifier for invariant DependencyOrder from ReviewOrchestration spec

GateEnforcement.description: Verifier for invariant GateEnforcement from ReviewOrchestration spec

CostMonotonicity.description: Verifier for invariant CostMonotonicity from ReviewOrchestration spec

CompletionConsistency.description: Verifier for invariant CompletionConsistency from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_Passes.description: Test assertion for Passes from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_DependencyOrder.description: Test assertion for DependencyOrder from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_GateEnforcement.message:
Assertion failed: GateEnforcement — (artifacts_verdict = "fail") =>
    (\A p \in Passes \ {"artifacts"} : pass_states[p] = "not_run")
assert_GateEnforcement.description: Test assertion for GateEnforcement from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_CostMonotonicity.description: Test assertion for CostMonotonicity from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_CompletionConsistency.message:
Assertion failed: CompletionConsistency — (current_step = "done") =>
    (\A p \in Passes : pass_states[p] = "done")
assert_CompletionConsistency.description: Test assertion for CompletionConsistency from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_ParallelSafety.description: Test assertion for ParallelSafety from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_BoundedCost.description: Test assertion for BoundedCost from ReviewOrchestration spec

assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from ReviewOrchestration spec
